app.name: Hyaecord
wizard.title: Welcome to Hyaecord
wizard.subtitle: Let's get you set up. Everything here is optional and explained in plain language.
wizard.theme.title: Theme
wizard.theme.detected.gnome: GNOME detected — matching your system theme.
wizard.theme.detected.kde: KDE Plasma detected — matching your system theme.
wizard.import.title: Import existing login
wizard.import.body: Hyaecord can import your session from Discord, Vesktop, or Equibop so you don't have to log in again.
wizard.integrations.title: Built-in features
wizard.integrations.body: UserPFP, UsrBG, GlobalBadges and RPC Bridge are on by default. Each one can be turned off any time in Settings.
wizard.telemetry.title: Anonymous usage stats
wizard.telemetry.body: Hyaecord sends one small anonymous ping a day — a random ID, app version, OS, and desktop environment. That's how we know how many people use Hyaecord and what to support. It is never linked to your Discord account and contains no messages or personal data. Turn it off here or in Settings at any time.
wizard.tos.title: Before you continue
wizard.tos.body: Hyaecord is a third-party client. Client modifications are against Discord's Terms of Service. Hyaecord ships nothing abusive, but use is at your own discretion.
wizard.import.soon: Importing isn't available yet — it arrives before the first stable release. You can log in normally in the meantime.
settings.title: Settings
settings.selfPinFade.description: Notices for messages you pin fade out after a short delay.
feature.userPFP.description: Show community profile pictures from the UserPFP database.
feature.usrBG.description: Show custom profile backgrounds from the UsrBG database.
feature.globalBadges.description: Show contributor badges from other client mods, plus the Hyaecord Contributor badge.
feature.rpcBridge.description: Let games and other apps set your Rich Presence without the official client.
settings.telemetry.description: One anonymous ping a day: random ID, version, OS, desktop environment. Never linked to your Discord account. Off means off — nothing is sent.
settings.disableFeature.title: Turn off {feature}?
settings.disableFeature.body: This is a built-in Hyaecord feature. You can re-enable it here at any time.
